subject: An armored rider atop a winged ram-like creature in flight; a falling star or comet streaks across the sky behind them
description: A compact winged creature — bovine in body with large curled horns, a ram-like face, and eagle wings — soars through a deep blue starfield. An armored rider sits atop it, holding a lance or spear aloft. Behind and to the right, a bright streak of light cuts diagonally across a reddish-orange sky, suggesting a comet or falling star. The background city far below is rendered in cool blue-purple silhouette. The composition is dynamic and diagonal, conveying high-altitude flight at speed.
foreground: Winged ram creature with armored rider; lance raised
background: Deep blue starfield; reddish orange sky with comet streak; city silhouette below
emotion: urgency and purpose — rider leans forward, mount strains forward through open sky
